name: Chautariya Pushkar Shah
profileSummary: Mukhtiyar General Sri Sri Sri Chautariya Pushkar Shah was a prominent Nepalese statesman, diplomat, and military leader. He served as Mukhtiyar of Nepal from August 1838 to early 1839. He is notable for his diplomatic missions to China and for attempting to establish strategic alliances with regional powers to protect Nepal’s sovereignty during the early 19th century.
